title: Actor JSON alsoKnownAs omits actor URL (Mastodon convention)
description: In src/activitypub.rs lines 139-145, the actor document's `alsoKnownAs` array includes the did:key and did:web identifiers but does NOT include the actor's own URL (`https://domain/@username`). Mastodon includes the profile URL in `alsoKnownAs` for account migration support. The DID document endpoint (line 817) correctly includes `https://{domain}/@{username}` in its `alsoKnownAs`, but the actor JSON does not. This is a convention issue, not a spec violation, but it breaks Mastodon migration compatibility. Fix: add `also_known_as.push(json\!(format\!("https://{domain}/@{username}")));` after line 145.
